{{Quote|I have specific orders not to tell you, but I have this feeling you might be good guessers.|Showolter, to Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian|<ref name="Assault at Selonia">''[[Assault at Selonia]]''</ref>}}
'''Showolter''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with pale skin and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He served with [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] as a [[Major/Legends|major]].

==Biography==
As a young man, then a [[Captain/Legends|captain]], he once worked in a [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] safehouse in the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]] alongside [[Saychel]], where he was assigned to protect [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] during the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]]. Under the code name '''Cof Yoly''', he was also in charge of the safety of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] "traitor" [[Elan]] and her familiar [[Vergere]]. Due to [[Peace Brigade]] interference, Showolter was shot and forced to give the traitors to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] [[Droma]].

However, he survived, and later observed the [[Battle of Tynna]] with [[Belindi Kalenda]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
